---
title: "ATI RV250 [Mobility Radeon 9000] not working with vesa driver on D600"
date: 2008-05-13
forum: Multimedia Software
---

### Post by robbofolle on 2008-05-13
Hi,
I am using ubuntu 7.10
I have to use an application which is not compatible with ati driver, so I have to use vesa driver.
Anyway if I use ati driver all works except that application (yes! i'm sure it cannot work with ati driver), instead if I use vesa driver X doesn't start.

Here is my xorg.conf
